title: draba densifolia var. globosa
intro: Draba densifolia var. globosa, also known as Globe Draba, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the Brassicaceae family. It is a succulent perennial with small, white flowers that has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The Globe Draba is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Globe Draba is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, with the dried flowers being steeped in hot water to make a medicinal drink.
